summary: Every call performs fixed leap-year tests and selects among twelve months, so the complete Gregorian input range has a constant operation bound unsuitable for scaling.

workload_bound.source_constraint: year is 1583 through 2100 and month is 1 through 12

replacement_checks.evidence: Leap-year divisibility and membership in the four 30-day months use constant-size tests.
The certificate regression checks all 6216 legal year/month pairs against the calendar library.
